must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 51% of Pumara Energy Public Company Limited (SET-listed) and related financing.
Parties: Acquirer Khlong Sai Holdings Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and KSH (Thailand) Co., Ltd., Company Reg. No. 0105567890123, 88/9 Rama 4 Road, Khwaeng Khlong Toei, Khet Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110.
Target: Pumara Energy Public Company Limited, Company Reg. No. 0105559999123, head office 199/3 Sukhumvit 66, Khwaeng Bang Na, Khet Bang Na, Bangkok 10260; contact legal@pumara-example.com.
Price and consideration: THB 6.75 per share in cash; total consideration approx. THB 3,042,000,000; post-closing mandatory tender offer in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Act and SEC/SET regulations.
Financing: equity from KSH and a THB 1,800,000,000 term loan from Kaset Capital Bank Public Co., Ltd.; escrow at Siam Provincial Bank, Account No. 123-456789-0, SWIFT SPBKTHB1.
Conditions precedent: filing of Tender Offer Statement (Form 247-4) with the SEC Thailand, disclosure via SET Portal, shareholder approvals under the Public Limited Companies Act, and Bank of Thailand foreign exchange filings (Form Tor.3) for cross-border remittances.
Employment and retention: CFO Khun Ratanapong Siriwong (Thai Passport No. NQ1234567) to enter into a 24‑month service agreement with a THB 8,000,000 retention bonus; notice details mobile +66 81 234 5678 and ratanapong@pumara-example.com.
MNPI and confidentiality: parties acknowledge receipt of preliminary unaudited Q2 EBITDA indication of approx. THB 182m not yet publicly disclosed in the 56-1 One Report; trading in the Target’s securities is prohibited until public disclosure on SET.
Covenants: no dividends other than ordinary course; maintain licenses and BOI privileges; comply with the Foreign Business Act if control thresholds trigger restricted business classifications.
Tax and identifiers: KSH (Thailand) Co., Ltd. TIN 0105567890123; Pumara Energy PCL VAT Reg. 0105559999123; primary contact Ms. Anong Preedaporn, Company Secretary, +66 2 880 1122.
Notices: send to 88/9 Rama 4 Road, Khwaeng Khlong Toei, Khet Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110, and by email to dealroom@ksh-example.com; project codename “Lantern”.
Closing logistics: funds in THB; FX to be documented with underlying invoices; settlement via TSD book-entry; any change of control filings under Tor Chor 12/2554 to be completed within statutory timelines.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
